title: Hot Springs Episode
wikitext:
[]: Hot Springs Episode             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Tue Mar 08, 2011 3:42 am IM pretty sure some ones done it already and if so can some one point me in the direction of it but... Cmon who doesnt wanna see that classic Hot Springs episode... u know the one that has the same plot in every anime yea thats the one... every one knows eva needs it and if it already doesnt have it, fat chance, some one needs to hop on pop and start making that fan fic. I for one have no real drawing/writing skills or i'd do it myself.. whose with me

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 08, 2011 3:53 am Magma Diver isn't good enough? http://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Episode_10_Scene_09

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Tue Mar 08, 2011 4:06 am ahhh u know what i havent watched the series in a while and ive kinda forgotten what episodes had what in them... though yes now that i remember its fine indeed... feel free to lock thread or just get rid of it

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Mar 08, 2011 4:18 am The show needs a beach episode where they go to Okinawa. Wait, that's what the hot spring episode was supposed to be.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Mar 08, 2011 4:21 am Uriel Septim VII wrote: The show needs a beach episode where they go to Okinawa. Wait, that's what the hot spring episode was supposed to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Mar 08, 2011 12:02 pm EvangelionFan wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Mar 08, 2011 1:35 pm Toji looks downright Machiavellian there.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Mar 08, 2011 1:36 pm Azathoth wrote: Fuck you, Touji. You deserved to lose your leg for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Mar 08, 2011 2:03 pm I wouldn't qualify Ep. 10 as a bonified hot springs episode, because... ya know... it's EVA! It doesn't follow the same conventions 'cause Eva isn't like every other anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Spud » Tue Mar 08, 2011 4:02 pm It just wouldn't fit It would feel out of place and forced (more than hot spring episodes already feel)

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Mar 08, 2011 4:14 pm Spud wrote: It just wouldn't fit It would feel out of place and forced (more than hot spring episodes already feel)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 08, 2011 4:58 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: I would only say that for EVA. For other animes, there could be ways to make it work. Like maybe your father owns a bath house and you take a few friends to get acquainted with your family. Something like that. Make it a part of the plot or a place where you'll have a defining character moment. There are many ways to pay with anime cliches.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 08, 2011 8:03 pm Ornette wrote: There are a lot of animes where a hotsprings episode wouldn't work. Like ... (Monster).

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Tue Mar 08, 2011 8:13 pm BrikHaus wrote: Oh god, can you imagine it? Johann in drag going to a hotsprings. Awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Wed Mar 16, 2011 8:00 pm Magma Diver IS the hot springs episode. It subverts the trope. Instead of a hot spring they go to a sterile and dull looking swimming pool, probably in their school. It's a whited out dull looking environment. They go to the hot spring at the end I guess. Anno was probably pressured into it, I'm sure. Also, like a proper hot springs episode it sucks and is useless.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Wed Mar 16, 2011 8:26 pm Ornette wrote: Like ones where there are not even any female cast (Akagi)

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Mar 16, 2011 9:24 pm SenorSquiid wrote: Also, like a proper hot springs episode it sucks and is useless.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 10:30 pm The hot spring episode in Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann was the best ever (the DVD version anyway). Especially because of the Asuka and Rei cameos.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 17, 2011 5:25 pm toe mash wrote: I see you've yet to meet the elusive all-male onsen episode...

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Sep 06, 2011 2:46 am Kendrix wrote: For what it's worth, we still got to see Asuka and Rei in their swimwear, as well as a naked Misato, even if we didn't get to see her, uh, naughty bits.

Article: Hot Springs Episode
 subverts the trope. Instead of a hot spring they go to a sterile and dull looking swimming pool, probably in their school. It's a whited out dull looking environment. They go to the hot spring at the end I guess. Anno was probably pressured into it, I'm sure. Also, like a proper hot springs episode it sucks and is useless.
